description: Proof-of-done gate that makes AI agents prove a task is done before claiming it.
pre_install: # The engine is bash; ship a .cmd launcher that forwards to the bundled
# done-gate.sh via bash (Git for Windows). %~dp0 resolves to this app dir,
# and cwd is preserved so .agent-proof\ lands in the caller's repo.
notes: v0.6.0 ships native PowerShell engines: done-gate.ps1 and stop-gate.ps1.
No Git Bash required — run directly with pwsh or powershell.
To enforce proof-of-done in Claude Code, wire the Stop hook in
